about.title: Oksana Yatsenko
about.subtitle: Professional Real Estate Agent in Batumi
about.story: I moved to Batumi in 2023 — and fell in love with the city. In 3 years I've closed over 120 deals, helping clients from Russia, Ukraine, Israel and Europe find their place on the Black Sea coast. I don't work for developers. I work for you.
about.story_p1: I moved to Batumi in 2023 — and stayed forever. I fell in love with this city: the Black Sea, the Adjara mountains on the horizon, the blend of architectural eras in the Old Town, the rapid growth of the new coastal district.
about.story_p2: I started working at an agency, but quickly realized clients need someone who will honestly talk about risks — not someone who sells at any cost. I became an independent agent and never looked back.
about.story_p3: In 3 years I've closed over 120 deals, helping Russians, Ukrainians, Belarusians, Kazakhs, Israelis, Turks and Europeans find their place on the Black Sea — for living, investing or holiday.
about.approach: I tell the truth — even if that means talking you out of a purchase. Because trust matters more than any single deal.
about.approach_1: I tell the truth about risks — even if it means losing the deal
about.approach_2: I don't work for developers — I work for you
about.approach_3: I conduct independent due diligence on every property
about.approach_4: I guide you from search to getting the keys
about.approach_5: I help with property management and rental after purchase
about.approach_6: Available on WhatsApp and Telegram — I respond within an hour
about.cta_bottom_text: Message me — I'll tell you about the market, answer your questions, and find the right options

batumi.hero_subtitle: The capital of Adjara — a Black Sea resort that has become the region's investment hub
batumi.city_text: Batumi is a port city on the Black Sea coast with a population of approximately 170,000. Over the past 15 years it has transformed from a Soviet-era resort into a modern hub for tourism and investment in the South Caucasus. Belle Époque architecture, Soviet-era blocks and glass skyscrapers coexist here — and the city changes faster every year.
batumi.d1_desc: Main tourist zone. High rental demand, sea views, well-developed infrastructure.
batumi.d2_desc: Historic centre with unique architecture. Year-round tourist footfall.
batumi.d3_desc: Quiet suburb for living. Clean air, villas, houses with gardens.
batumi.d4_desc: Border area on the sea. Fast price growth, beach, promising location.
batumi.cta_title: Want to buy property in Batumi?
batumi.cta_text: Oksana lives and works in Batumi — she knows every neighbourhood from the inside and the real market prices.

invest.hero_subtitle: How to buy property in Batumi and earn a stable income — without unnecessary risk or hidden costs
invest.step1_desc: We discuss the market, your budget and goals: buy to live, rent out short-term, or resell in 2–3 years.
invest.step2_desc: I show you suitable options — only vetted developers and owners, no hidden fees.
invest.step3_desc: We verify ownership, encumbrances and documents. We work with independent lawyers.
invest.step4_desc: I accompany you at every step. Registration through NAPR takes 4 business days.
invest.step5_desc: I'll help set up rental management or find tenants.
invest.cta_text: No commitment. I'll tell you what's happening in the Batumi market right now.
